titleStmt.title: Zheng Shuzu Fuzi miao bei (rubbing)
夫子廟碑 / 乾明孔廟碑 / 夫子之碑（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Zheng Shuzu Fuzi miao bei. ATTRIBUTED to Zheng Daozhao in the Berkeley catalogue (filed under 鄭叔祖), but the 乾明 (560) Northern-Qi date makes direct authorship impossible — flag as a traditional/spurious attribution. Companion records: 244799, 244800. Included for completeness/honesty. UC Berkeley EAL Chinese Rubbings Collection (Hsin218).

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Catalogued 560 (乾明 era, Northern Qi). ATTRIBUTION CAUTION: this post-dates Zheng Daozhao's death (516); cataloguing it under his name (鄭叔祖) follows a traditional attribution that is chronologically problematic.

bibl.ref: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom, open access (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
